meta.name: Generic Blog
meta.description: Multi-platform blog extraction selectors for WordPress, Wix, DealerOn, Webflow, and generic blogs
meta.author: Page Capture

rules.name: categories
rules.selector: div.blog__entry__content__categories a, div.meta-below-content a[rel='category tag'], div.categories a, a[rel='category tag'], [rel='category'], ul[aria-label='Post categories'] a, section ul.pRGtWE li a, meta[name='article:section'], .category, .categories a, .post-categories a, .post-categories li

rules.name: tags
rules.selector: ul.blog__entry__content__tags li a, nav[aria-label='Tags'] ul li a, .zmug2R li a, ._u2fqx, .tag a, .tags a, [rel='tag'], .post-tags a, .post-tags li, .entry-tags a

rules.name: featured_image
rules.selector: .featured-image img, .post-thumbnail img, article img:first-of-type, [itemprop='image'], .wp-post-image, .post-image img, .entry-image img, img.featured

rules.name: content_html
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text, div.blog__entry__content > div, div.blog__entry__content, div.editor, div.entry-content.text-content-container, div.rich-text-block, div.post-body-container, section[data-hook='post-description'], div.entry, div.blogContent, div.elementor-widget-theme-post-content, div[data-elementor-type='wp-post'], div[data-elementor-type='wp-page'], article .entry-content, .post-content, .article-content, article, [itemprop='articleBody'], .content, .blog-content, main

rules.name: content_text
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text, div.blog__entry__content > div, div.blog__entry__content, div.editor, div.entry-content.text-content-container, div.rich-text-block, div.post-body-container, section[data-hook='post-description'], div.entry, div.blogContent, div.elementor-widget-theme-post-content, div[data-elementor-type='wp-post'], div[data-elementor-type='wp-page'], article .entry-content, .post-content, .article-content, article, [itemprop='articleBody'], .content, .blog-content, main

rules.name: content_images
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text img, div.blog__entry__content img, div.editor img, div.rich-text-block img, div.post-body-container img, div.entry img, div.blogContent img, div[data-elementor-type] img, .entry-content img, .post-content img, article img, .content img

rules.name: content_image_alts
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text img, div.blog__entry__content img, div.editor img, div.rich-text-block img, div.post-body-container img, div.entry img, div.blogContent img, div[data-elementor-type] img, .entry-content img, .post-content img, article img, .content img
